title: Appendix #A-1 ORS Cheque Search Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-1	ORS Cheque Search Fields
Search Field
Description
Format
Instructions
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Drop-down
芒聙聯 Default is All
芒聙聯 Select a single transit to narrow down search
Account
MICR account number on cheque
Text box,
1芒聙聯14 digits
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹acct1芒聙聺 to search for a specific account
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹acct1-acct2芒聙聺 to search for a range of accounts
芒聙聯 Use wildcard 芒聙聹%芒聙聺 to search by membership number (Example: %123456 to search for items with membership number of 123456)
No Account
No account number printed on bottom of cheque
Checkbox
芒聙聯 Check this box to search for items that cleared without account numbers
From
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
芒聙聯Select the calendar icon and then select a date from calendar
芒聙聯 Select the date by selecting the day of month in the calendar
To
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
芒聙聯 Select the calendar icon and then select a date from calendar
芒聙聯 Select the date by selecting the day of the month in the calendar
Amount
Dollar amount of item
Text box, 1芒聙聯8 digit dollar amount + 芒聙聹.芒聙聺 + 2 digit cents
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹amnt1芒聙聺 to search for specific amount
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹amnt1-芒聙聺 to search for specific amount and over
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹-amnt1芒聙聺 to search for specific amount and under
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹amnt1-amnt2芒聙聺 to search for range of amounts
Currency
Currency
Drop-down
芒聙聯 Default is All
芒聙聯 Other options are CAD (Canadian) and USD (US)
Cheque #
Cheque serial #
Text box, 1芒聙聯12 digits
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹cheq1芒聙聺 to search for specific cheque #
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹cheq1-芒聙聺 to search for specific cheque # and over
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹-cheq1芒聙聺 to search for specific cheque # and under
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹cheq1-cheq2芒聙聺 to search for range of cheque #s
Trace #
Trace #
Text box, 1芒聙聯10 digits
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹trc1芒聙聺 to search for specific trace #
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹trc1-芒聙聺 to search for specific trace # and over
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹-trc1芒聙聺 to search for specific trace # and under
芒聙聯 Use 芒聙聹trc1-trc2芒聙聺 to search for range of trace #s
Return Code
Cheque return reason code
Drop-down
芒聙聯 Default is All
